description: CompositionBlack shawl neck sleeveless top, made of 100% cotton with metal stud detailing along the armholesFitRegularWash careHand washDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, or bleachDry flat in shadeCool ironThis season's fuss-free minimalistic trend is nailed in this top with its plush fabric. The metal stud embellishment adds an interesting dimension to this basic top. Style this piece from s.oliver with form fitting denims, closed-toe casual shoes from enroute and a  vibrant scarf.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
